bug_summary: A tool's execute() future is awaited directly inside the agent loop task with no panic isolation, so a panicking tool unwinds the entire loop, closes the input channel, and every subsequent ask fails permanently with RPC -32603 ("session loop has terminated").

cases.title: Tool future awaited in loop task without catch_unwind (panic wedges the session)
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.

cases.title: Request handler future awaited inside the event loop with no panic isolation
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.
